name: SYNergy ScienTech Corp.
summary: SYNergy ScienTech Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells rechargeable lithium-ion and lithium-ion polymer batteries in Taiwan and internationally. Its products are used in various portable electronic products, such as Bluetooth headsets, MP3 and DSC products, cellular phones, and notebook computers, as well as other products. SYNergy ScienTech Corp. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
